query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quick_notes) AS total_quick_notes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quick_notes WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AS notes_this_week,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM weekly_roundups WHERE submitted_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) AS roundups_this_week,
  (SELECT MAX(submitted_at) FROM weekly_roundups) AS latest_roundup_at,
  (SELECT quick_notes FROM weekly_roundups ORDER BY submitted_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS latest_roundup_notes;
